positive: Minimalist and elegant forest silhouette: A serene grove of stylized deciduous trees forming a repeating, symmetrical pattern. The primary subject is the interconnected silhouette of the canopy and trunks, rendered in deep emerald green and charcoal black. The background should be a soft, abstract gradient of muted sky blue and creamy ivory. Composition should be a centered, vertical repeating motif suitable for repeating textile patterns or screen printing. Style should evoke modern linework, negative space art, and high-contrast nature motifs. Lighting is even and diffuse, enhancing the crispness of the silhouette edges. Print-friendly details mandate sharp lines, no gradient fuzziness on the main subjects, and optimal separation for single-color printing.
